pr.title: Cleanup additional ASSERT macros in texp
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Cleaned up local ASSERT wrapper macros in src/sysdolphin/baselib/texp.c after they were no longer needed for linking. The PR removed file/message string statics used only by custom HSD_ASSERT3/HSD_ASSERT4 wrappers, replaced those calls with the standard HSD_ASSERT(line, condition), and changed one HSD_Panic call to use __FILE__ instead of the removed static file-name string.
what_changed: Removed local macro definitions HSD_ASSERT3(file, line, cond) and HSD_ASSERT4(file, line, msg, cond) from texp.c.

Removed static string symbols HSD_TExp_804D5FC8 containing "texp.c", HSD_TExp_80407738 containing "texp_list", and valgr0 containing "val >= 0" because the replacement standard ASSERT macro no longer needs those explicit string objects.
Replaced many HSD_ASSERT3(HSD_TExp_804D5FC8, line, condition) calls with HSD_ASSERT(line, condition).
Replaced HSD_ASSERT4(HSD_TExp_804D5FC8, line, HSD_TExp_80407738, condition) calls with HSD_ASSERT(line, condition), including checks for texp_list in HSD_TExpTev, HSD_TExpCnst, and HSD_TExpCompile.
Replaced the remaining HSD_ASSERT4 using valgr0 in HSD_TExpCompile with HSD_ASSERT(1660, val >= 0).
Changed HSD_Panic(HSD_TExp_804D5FC8, 503, ...) to HSD_Panic(__FILE__, 503, ...) after removing the static file-name string.
smart_moves: The cleanup preserved the original assert line numbers, including hexadecimal line constants such as 0x47B through 0x4D8, which keeps debug/assert provenance stable while removing decomp-only wrapper noise.
The PR removed the helper strings only after all macro uses that depended on them were converted, avoiding unused static data and symbol clutter.
Using HSD_ASSERT directly makes the file consistent with the project's post-linking cleanup style instead of carrying bespoke HSD_ASSERT3/HSD_ASSERT4 compatibility shims.
The HSD_Panic call was updated to __FILE__ rather than retaining a one-off static string just for panic file reporting.
decomp_lessons: Once a file no longer needs to preserve link-time static string symbols for matching, replace local ASSERT wrapper macros with the canonical project HSD_ASSERT form.
Assert cleanup should retain the original line number arguments because they are meaningful source evidence and can affect matching/debug behavior.
After converting macro call sites, check for now-unused string literals or static arrays created only to feed the older wrappers.
For panic/error calls that need the source filename, __FILE__ can replace a decomp artifact static filename string when linking constraints no longer require the explicit symbol.
naming_conventions: Canonical assert calls in this codebase use HSD_ASSERT(line, condition), not local HSD_ASSERT3 or HSD_ASSERT4 wrappers.
Removed decomp-generated static names such as HSD_TExp_804D5FC8 and HSD_TExp_80407738 when their only purpose was assert wrapper compatibility.

The cleanup avoided renaming functional texp symbols; touched functions include HSD_TExpTev, HSD_TExpCnst, HSD_TExpColorOp, HSD_TExpAlphaOp, HSD_TExpColorIn, HSD_TExpAlphaIn, HSD_TExpOrder, TExpAssignReg, TExp2TevDesc, and HSD_TExpCompile.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: This was enabled because the project was 'not linking' per the PR body, so link-preserving local assert wrappers and string statics could be removed.
The transformation is mechanical: HSD_ASSERT3(file, line, cond) becomes HSD_ASSERT(line, cond); HSD_ASSERT4(file, line, msg, cond) becomes HSD_ASSERT(line, cond).
When replacing HSD_ASSERT4, the explicit message string argument was dropped; the evidence in this PR shows both texp_list and val >= 0 message strings became unnecessary.
searchable_terms: Cleanup additional ASSERT macros in texp
follow_up_queries: Find other files still defining HSD_ASSERT3 or HSD_ASSERT4 wrappers that can be converted to HSD_ASSERT.
Search for static filename strings used only as assert or panic file arguments after unlinking cleanup.
Search for message-only static strings such as condition text arrays that become dead after HSD_ASSERT4 conversion.
